SEARCH
Package model.dungeon

Klasse Room

java.lang.Object
model.dungeon.Room
Alle implementierten Schnittstellen:
Serializable
public class Room extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a room in the dungeon.

A room can contain multiple exits, each associated with one of the cardinal directions. These exits connect the room to neighboring rooms.

Seit:
2026
Autor:
Bastian Rentzsch
Siehe auch:

    exits

  • Methodendetails

    • addExit

      public void addExit(Exit exit)
      Adds an exit to this room.
      Parameter:
      exit - the exit to add

    • getExit

      public Exit getExit(Direction direction)
      Returns the exit in the specified direction.
      Parameter:
      direction - the direction of the requested exit
      Gibt zurück:
      the corresponding Exit, or null if no exit exists in that direction
